title: Managed Agents in the Gemini API
summary: Google's Managed Agents service provides one-API-call autonomous agents that run in remote Linux sandboxes, powered by Gemini 3.5 Flash and the Antigravity Agent Harness. The system includes an Interactions API with agent-native documentation and skills, demonstrated turning Hacker News threads into radio shows using Gemini TTS and Lyria.
